notes: GW38 is the final gameweek of the 2024-25 PL season — rotation risk is elevated across all clubs fighting for nothing or protecting European-final legs.
Tottenham are the worst-affected squad: Son, Romero, Kulusevski, Maddison, Bergvall, Dragusin, and Werner all confirmed out.
No suspensions expire entering GW38 — no returning ban assets this gameweek.

features.json is currently a SAMPLE file with only 6 tracked players. A full squad matrix requires running scripts/fpl_fetch.py against the live FPL API. The 6 featured players have been fully assessed; broader league injury intelligence is drawn from press conferences and FFS reporting.
Arsenal rotation alert: even fully-fit players (Saka, Odegaard, Gabriel) are plausible rests ahead of their UCL final. Treat all Arsenal FPL assets with caution unless Arteta confirms starts.
